# @n8n-dev/n8n-nodes-amazonaws-cloudhsmv2

![amazonaws-cloudhsmv2 Banner](banner.svg)

[![npm version](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/@n8n-dev/n8n-nodes-amazonaws-cloudhsmv2.svg)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@n8n-dev/n8n-nodes-amazonaws-cloudhsmv2)
[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)

---

**Stop writing amazonaws-cloudhsmv2 API integrations by hand.**

Every time you connect n8n to amazonaws-cloudhsmv2, you waste hours mapping endpoints, defining parameters, and debugging schemas. You copy-paste from docs, fix edge cases, and pray nothing breaks.

**What if connecting n8n to amazonaws-cloudhsmv2 took 5 minutes, not half a day?**

This node gives you **1+ resources** out of the box: **Default**: with full CRUD operations, typed parameters, and zero manual configuration.

---

## What You Get

- **Zero boilerplate**: Resources, operations, and fields are pre-configured and ready to use
- **Full CRUD**: Create, read, update, and delete support where the API allows it
- **Typed parameters**: No more guessing field types
- **Built-in auth**: API key authentication, ready to go
- **Declarative**: Native n8n performance, no custom execute() overhead

---

## Install

```bash
npm install @n8n-dev/n8n-nodes-amazonaws-cloudhsmv2
```

**Or in n8n:**
1. **Settings → Community Nodes → Install**
2. Search: `@n8n-dev/n8n-nodes-amazonaws-cloudhsmv2`
3. Click **Install**

---

## Quick Start

1. Install the node (above)
2. Add credentials: **amazonaws-cloudhsmv2 API** → paste your API key
3. Drag the **amazonaws-cloudhsmv2** node into your workflow
4. Pick a resource → pick an operation → done.

That's it. No configuration files. No code. It just works.

---

## Resources

| Resource | Operations |
|----------|------------|
| Default | Post copy backup to region, Post create cluster, Post create hsm, Post delete backup, Post delete cluster, Post delete hsm, Post describe backups, Post describe clusters, Post initialize cluster, Post list tags, Post modify backup attributes, Post modify cluster, Post restore backup, Post tag resource, Post untag resource |

---

## Why This Node?

**Without this node:**
- Hours of manual API integration
- Copy-pasting from amazonaws-cloudhsmv2 docs
- Debugging auth, pagination, error handling
- Maintaining your own client code

**With this node:**
- Install → configure → use. 5 minutes.
- Auto-generated from the official amazonaws-cloudhsmv2 OpenAPI spec
- Always up to date when the API changes
- Native n8n performance

---

## Auto-Generated
This node was auto-generated from the official **amazonaws-cloudhsmv2** OpenAPI specification using
[@n8n-dev/n8n-openapi-node-ultimate](https://github.com/kelvinzer0/n8n-openapi-node-ultimate),
then validated against the live API so you get accurate types and real parameters, not guesswork.

When the amazonaws-cloudhsmv2 API updates, this node updates too.

---

## Support This Project

If this node saved you hours of work, consider supporting continued development, new APIs, better error handling, and faster updates.
